title: Ekoa: login, run a job, verified result

segments.text: Ekoa: login, run a job, see the verified result
segments.subtitle: ekoa-code · 2026-07-10

beats.caption: The Ekoa dashboard login
beats.expectedScreen: the Portuguese login page with username and password fields and an Entrar button

beats.caption: Sign in and land on the chat workspace
beats.expectedScreen: the chat workspace after login, with the sidebar and the message composer visible

beats.caption: Submit a job: compound interest on 1000 EUR at 5% over 3 years
beats.expectedScreen: the chat with the submitted compound-interest question visible as a user message

actions.text: Explica em poucas frases o que é juro composto e calcula quanto rendem 1000 euros a 5% ao ano durante 3 anos, mostrando o cálculo.

beats.caption: The agent runs and the answer streams in live
beats.expectedScreen: the chat mid-run: a thinking indicator, the answer streaming in, or the just-completed answer below the question

beats.caption: The result: 157,63 EUR of interest on 1000 EUR over 3 years. Correct.
beats.expectedScreen: the full assistant answer with the compound-interest calculation, the 157,63 interest figure highlighted

beats.caption: The run is metered: live token usage in the dashboard header
beats.expectedScreen: the dashboard header with the Tokens usage meter highlighted, showing tokens consumed out of the quota

beats.caption: A session from an earlier run, loaded fresh by URL: the transcript persists
beats.expectedScreen: a full page load of a chat session URL showing a persisted transcript with the same compound-interest answer

segments.caption: The fresh transcript as the API returns it: persisted server-side
segments.expectedScreen: an API response panel showing the assistant message with the 157,63 result line highlighted

highlight.note: the computed result, persisted with the session

segments.text: Login, job submitted, correct result, persisted
